options.content:
Ops Phase 1 Nginx dashboard placeholder

Required future panels:
- 2xx/4xx/5xx
- 429 Count
- upstream_response_time
- request_time
- denied internal endpoint access

Nginx exporter is deferred to Ops Phase 2.
